## Summary

Describe the behavior or repository change and why it is needed.

## Testing

List the commands or manual checks used to verify the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits.
- [ ] Tests cover behavior changes.
- [ ] Public API or operational changes are documented.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally.
- [ ] The change does not add signaling or reconnection behavior to the core package.
